subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured and believing in God! Mention of thee hath been made before the Wronged One. We beseech Him, exalted be He, to make thee a dawning-place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الموقن المومن بالله قد ذکرت لدی المظلوم نسئله تعالی بان یجعلک مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @call to action
